test_cases.description: Verifies the skill produces a structured hypothesis using the documented framework
test_cases.input: Help me write a hypothesis for testing a shorter signup form (from 6 fields to 3 fields) on our SaaS product

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill correctly calculates or references sample size requirements
test_cases.input: Our landing page has a 3% conversion rate and we want to detect a 20% improvement. How many visitors do we need per variant?
expected_output_excludes: just run it for a week

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill warns against statistical mistakes like peeking at results
test_cases.input: We started an A/B test yesterday and the variant is already showing 15% improvement with 95% confidence. Should we stop and ship it?
